title: Add SelfTrainingClassifier semi-supervised meta-estimator
description:
sklearn SelfTrainingClassifier wraps any base classifier and iteratively pseudo-labels unlabeled data (y == -1) to expand the training set. Stops when no more high-confidence predictions exist or max_iter reached.

ferrolearn-cluster currently has LabelPropagation and LabelSpreading but not the meta-estimator. Implementation requires a classifier trait bound + iterative re-fit loop. Defer — meta-estimator pattern needs design across the workspace.
